name: Handel: Acis & Galatea
artist: George Frideric Handel, Dunedin Consort, John Butt

tracks.t: Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 1. Sinfonia
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 2. Chorus. Oh, the Pleasure of the Plains!
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 3. Accompagnato. Ye Verdant Plains and Woody Mountains (Galatea)
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 4. Air. Hush, Ye Pretty Warbling Choir! (Galatea)
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 5. Air. Where Shall I Seek the Charming Fair? (Acis)
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 6. Recitative. Stay, Shepherd, Stay! (Damon)
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 7. Air. Shepherd, What Art Thou Pursuing? (Damon)
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 8. Recitative. Lo, Here My Love (Acis)
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 9. Air. Love in Her Eyes Sits Playing (Acis)
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 10. Recitative. Oh Didst Thou Know the Pains of Absent Love (Galatea)
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 11. Air. As When the Dove Laments Her Love (Galatea)
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 12. Duet. Happy, Happy We! (Acis and Galatea)
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 13. Chorus. Wretched Lovers!
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 14. Accompagnato. I Rage - I Melt - I Burn! (Polyphemus)
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 15. Air. O Ruddier Than the Cherry (Polyphemus)
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 16. Recitative. Whither, Fairest, Art Thou Running (Polyphemus, Galatea)
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 17. Air. Cease to Beauty to Be Suing (Polyphemus)
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 18. Would You Gain the Tender Creature (Coridon)
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 19. Recitative. His Hideous Love Provokes My Rage (Acis)
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 20. Air. Love Sounds th' Alarm
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 21. Air. Consider, Fond Shepherd
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 22. Recitative. Cease, Oh Cease, Thou Gentle Youth
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 23. Trio. The Flocks Shall Leave the Mountains (Galatea, Acis, Polyphemus)
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 24. Accompagnato. Help, Galatea! Help, Ye Parent Gods! (Acis)
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 25. Chorus. Mourn, All Ye Muses
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 26. Solo and Chorus. Must I Acis Still Bemoan (Galatea)
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 27. Recitative. 'Tis Done! Thus I Exert My Pow'r Divine (Galatea)
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 28. Air. Heart, the Seat of Soft Delight (Galatea)
Acis and Galatea, HWV 49: 29. Chorus. Galatea, Dry Thy Tears
